headline: Is FedEx’s Freight Spin-off and AI Push Reshaping the Investment Case for FDX?
summary: FedEx has recently advanced several initiatives, including amending its long-term incentive plans around the June 2026 FedEx Freight spin-off, rolling out reusable packaging, and adjusting fuel and regional surcharges in response to geopolitical tensions and higher fuel costs. These moves, combined with ongoing DRIVE cost savings, AI deployment across its network, and FedEx surpassing UPS in market capitalization, highlight how operational efficiency and business model changes are reshaping...
